records.evidence_label: Bulbapedia W Promotional card list row: Pikachu (Jungle 60)
records.notes: Bulbapedia lists Pikachu from Jungle 60 in the W Promotional stamped promo card list.

records.evidence_label: Cardmarket W Promos product row: Pikachu WPR JU 60

records.notes: Cardmarket's W Promos checklist records this card in the W-stamped promo lane.
